ford_grand_c_max_job_note_6d63d3cfa6.text: The Grand C-Max shares the C-Max CB7 security family. The professional Ford transponder catalogue places C-Max 2010-2015 in DST80/ID63-6F. Silca lists C-Max CB7 2010-2015 with HU101 and 433 MHz. Tool IDs and exact OEM remote part numbers remain to be mapped.

ford_grand_c_max_job_note_e4a833e5b9.text: This exact Grand C-Max keyless application is listed by a UK professional supplier as 433 MHz ID49 with HU101. Transponder family and C-Max CEU blade/frequency are independently supported by Transpondery and Silca. OEM part number remains to be added.

ford_grand_c_max_job_note_eee60ac7b3.text: Transpondery places C-Max 2015-2020 in Hitag Pro. Silca lists C-Max CEU 2015-on with HU101 and 433 MHz; KeyStation explicitly lists a C-Max/Focus/Grand C-Max 433 MHz ID49 HU101 keyless family. Exact keyed remote OEM part number remains to be added.

ford_grand_c_max_job_note_3da5f8f13e.text: Use only where passive start is physically confirmed. Core blade, transponder and frequency are supported by C-Max family application catalogues. Exact OEM part number remains to be added.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
